subject: Project Review Meeting Invitation
body:
Hello,

We would like to schedule a joint project review meeting next week to discuss Q1 progress and Q2 plans.

Please invite the following people to attend:
- Leo Zhao from your Engineering department
- Mike Li from your Product department
- 3 people will attend from our side

The meeting will be approximately 2 hours. Please check everyone's availability next Wednesday (March 4, 2026) afternoon and let us know a feasible time slot.

If Wednesday doesn't work, Thursday afternoon is also an option.

Thank you,
Director Chen
Partner Corp

subject: Re: Weekly Work Summary
body:
Noted, weekly summary has been submitted.

Also, a heads up: I have an internal tech sharing session next Wednesday afternoon from 2 to 3 PM. I'm available at all other times.

Leo Zhao

subject: Next Week's Schedule
body:
Hi,

I'm free all day next Wednesday. On Thursday, I have a client visit after 3 PM, so anytime before 3 PM works.

Mike Li
